title: JavaScript Control Structures Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating robust and cross-browser web experiences with control structures and logic.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional-grade web application in JavaScript?
options: Using conditional (if...else) statements to control the flow of your program.

questions.question: Which keyword is used to start a 'Conditional' block that runs ONLY if a specific comparison is true?
Which control structure is best for handling MANY different conditions based on a single value (like different roles for a user)?
One of the most powerful use cases for 'Control Structures' is ________ (naming them in camelCase like totalProjectCost).
In JavaScript, the number zero (0) and an empty string ('') are both considered ________?
